source: Surgical missing-field truth audit sprint — all evidence from local sandbox files only (permits_sample.json column inspection, field_registry.json, DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md, OLD_COCKPIT_FIELD_IMPORT_REPORT.md, SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md, source_roadmap.json, dashboard_summary.json). No invention.
notes: Corrected labels distinguish truly absent row data from fields that are known in reference specs / future sources but absent from the current 19-column permits_sample.json snapshot. UI now uses these precise labels instead of generic MISSING.

entries.page_or_tab: Drawer Overview, Full Case File Snapshot, Permit, Case Tree
entries.reason: Column exists in permits_sample.json but value is frequently null (many rows have no valuation). Richer source exists in accela_details per field_registry and SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json row inspection (valuation: null on first row); field_registry.json entry 'valuation' current_status=MISSING + notes; DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md 'valuation' under Core but sparse
entries.recommended_next_action: Prefer accela_details.valuation on future enrichment passes; surface both values with conflict warning when available

entries.page_or_tab: Drawer Overview, Full Case File Snapshot, Permit, Owner & Parcel, Case Tree
entries.reason: Column exists in permits_sample.json (~81.5% populated per historical audits). When absent on a specific row it is genuinely missing for that permit in the source data.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json keys + row values; SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md (address 81.5% coverage)
entries.recommended_next_action: Leave as MISSING IN CURRENT ROW for rows where the column is null; improve upstream capture if Accela reports have it elsewhere

entries.page_or_tab: Drawer Overview, Full Case File Owner & Parcel, BCPA, Case Tree
entries.reason: Always present in the 19-column permits_sample.json for every row in the sandbox (e.g. DEMO-4942-100101). The previous generic MISSING was incorrect for this field.
entries.proof_source: Direct inspection of permits_sample.json (parcel_id present on all sampled rows); field_registry.json 'folio' PRESENT (demo data)
entries.recommended_next_action: Already correct in most places after audit; ensure consistent use of p.parcel_id

entries.page_or_tab: Drawer Overview, Full Case File Owner & Parcel, Snapshot, Case Tree
entries.reason: Column exists but coverage is extremely low on recent rows (0% on newest 1,000 in some reports; 2.1% archive-wide per SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT). When absent it is missing from the source extract for that permit.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json (sparse on many rows); SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md owner_name 2.1% / 0% newest; DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md
entries.recommended_next_action: Prioritize owner_resolution + BCPA mailing address join in next enrichment wave

entries.page_or_tab: Drawer Overview, Full Case File Contractor & Sunbiz, Case Tree
entries.reason: Column exists in permits_sample.json with ~56% coverage per audits. When null on a row it is absent from the current source extract.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json inspection + SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md 56.4%
entries.recommended_next_action: Continue Sunbiz + Accela detail enrichment for higher coverage

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File BCPA Property Card, Owner & Parcel (Just Value row)
entries.reason: Rich BCPA just_value / just_value_num exists in the old Claude spec and bcpa_property_card mock structure, but the current permits_sample.json snapshot has no such column. field_registry explicitly marks it MISSING + 'Deferred - not in current sample columns'.
entries.proof_source: field_registry.json (bcpa_just_value and just_value entries); DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md 'BCPA: just_value...'; OLD_COCKPIT... 'rich BCPA fields... not present in current permits_sample.json'; SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT ~17% BCPA capture
entries.recommended_next_action: Wire bcpa_property_card.just_value (and numeric variant) when expanding BCPA enrichment adapter

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File BCPA Property Card
entries.reason: Example given in UI ('00-01 Vacant Residential') comes from old Claude spec. Not a column in the 19-field permits_sample.json snapshot.
entries.proof_source: UI note + field_registry + DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md BCPA section
entries.recommended_next_action: Include use_code when expanding BCPA adapter output

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File BCPA Property Card
entries.reason: Known in BCPA spec per old audits and field_registry notes. Absent from current sample columns.
entries.proof_source: field_registry.json + DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md + OLD_COCKPIT report
entries.recommended_next_action: Add when BCPA enrichment is expanded

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Broward Clerk / BCRM, Case Tree (Data Quality)
entries.reason: Entire Broward Clerk tab is marked 'intentionally STUB' because 'No dedicated table exists in the local READONLY sample yet'. source_roadmap and reality matrix list it as high-risk planned with kill switch. No data in any current JSON.
entries.proof_source: UI code comment + DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md 'zero data in sandbox' + source_roadmap.json Broward Clerk entry (kill_switch true) + BROWARD_LIENS_AUDIT.md in inventory
entries.recommended_next_action: Manual one-file download + mock run only after explicit future approval (first safe test per source_roadmap)

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Accela Detail, Contractor & Sunbiz (License #)
entries.reason: UI explicitly says 'See rich parsed fields in old spec'. field_registry marks application_info_json as STUB. Rich fields (Contract Value, HCD/CRA flags, etc.) exist in old Claude artifacts but not surfaced from current sample.
entries.proof_source: UI text + field_registry.json + OLD_COCKPIT report 'Accela Detail: rich workflow_json, conditions...' + SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT Accela detail extraction
entries.recommended_next_action: Parse and surface key application_info fields from accela_details when expanding that adapter

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Accela Detail
entries.reason: UI says 'Normalized from accela_inspections table (never raw_json per spec)'. Audit documents that half the current accela_inspections rows are pagination junk. No normalized clean inspections in the sandbox snapshot used by the dashboard.
entries.proof_source: UI + SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md (9,919 junk rows) + field_registry 'inspections' STUB
entries.recommended_next_action: Clean + normalize inspections in future parser-cleaner pass before wiring to UI

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Accela Detail
entries.reason: UI already correctly labels 'Often empty in current snapshot — shows not yet captured warning in old spec'. This is accurate.
entries.proof_source: UI text + OLD_COCKPIT report
entries.recommended_next_action: Leave labeled STALE until workflow data is captured in a future Accela enrichment

entries.page_or_tab: Drawer Overview (MISSING FIELDS), Snapshot (WHAT IS MISSING?), Case Tree (Data Quality)
entries.reason: Values are present in the sample row (lat/lon exist) but dashboard_summary.json + reality matrix + UI explicitly call the cache '23+ days old' and 'STALE'. The label 'Missing' was misleading.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json (lat/lon present on rows); dashboard_summary.json stale geocode warning; DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md 'Geocoding: present but stale'
entries.recommended_next_action: Re-geocode the full set before any spatial use; keep STALE warning prominent

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Contractor & Sunbiz
entries.reason: UI says 'available in full Accela contractor_license per old spec'. Basic Sunbiz match timestamp is present, but the deeper license # / status / officers from Sunbiz mock or Accela detail are not wired into the displayed fields.
entries.proof_source: UI text + field_registry 'contractor_company' STUB + mock_adapters/sunbiz_sample.json structure
entries.recommended_next_action: Surface contractor_license and Sunbiz status/officers when expanding Contractor tab depth

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Provenance, Drawer Sources
entries.reason: The source_* timestamp fields (source_accela, source_bcpa, source_sunbiz) and last_enriched_at are present in every row of the sample. The previous generic MISSING when the badge logic ran was sometimes inaccurate.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json (all three source_* + last_enriched_at present on rows); Provenance tab code already shows them when truthy
entries.recommended_next_action: Keep the conditional PRESENT / MISSING logic but it now reflects actual row truth more accurately after other label fixes

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Broward Clerk, Case Tree
entries.reason: No Broward Clerk data table or columns exist in any current sandbox JSON. Explicitly called out as future in source_roadmap, reality matrix, and the 9 inventory audits.
entries.likely_source: Broward Official Records / BCRM / Clerk feed
entries.proof_source: source_roadmap.json (Broward Clerk entry) + DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md + BROWARD_LIENS_AUDIT.md + UI 'no dedicated table'
entries.recommended_next_action: Manual public records pull + mock adapter only after explicit approval (high risk per roadmap)

entries.display_label: BCPA sales history / tax / flood / mailing address
entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File BCPA (notes), Owner & Parcel
entries.reason: SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT documents that BCPA exposes ~190 fields in raw_json but only 33 columns captured. Sales history (5-row), tax, flood, full mailing address are in raw_json or separate low-coverage tables (26% for sales). Not in the dashboard's permits_sample snapshot.
entries.proof_source: SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md (BCPA 17% capture + specific missing fields list); DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md; field_registry
entries.recommended_next_action: Expand BCPA adapter to emit selected high-value raw_json fields + join sales_history for matched folios

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Owner & Parcel (not currently shown)
entries.reason: field_registry has dedicated entry for owner_confidence marked STUB. UI never displays a numeric confidence or requires_human_verification flag even when owner_name is resolved.
entries.proof_source: field_registry.json owner_confidence entry + DATA_REALITY_MATRIX.md owner resolution section
entries.recommended_next_action: Surface confidence + verification flag in Owner & Parcel tab when owner_resolution data is richer

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Accela Detail (notes), Raw Row (via JSON)
entries.reason: Old spec and audits document rich related-records, documents, conditions, comments. Current sample only exposes the flat row + limited accela_details; deep structures remain in unparsed raw_json or future tables.
entries.proof_source: OLD_COCKPIT report + DATA_REALITY_MATRIX 'Accela Related Records' + UI notes in Accela tab
entries.recommended_next_action: Parse accela related records + documents in future Accela detail enrichment

entries.page_or_tab: Full Case File Provenance, Case Tree (Data Quality)
entries.reason: The field exists and has a value on every row in the sample. It is the local snapshot enrichment timestamp.
entries.proof_source: permits_sample.json (last_enriched_at present on all rows)
entries.recommended_next_action: Already accurate; keep the Local Snapshot badge
